cart.title: Inqola
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Sicela wengeze ikheli lokubhilela ukuze uqhubeke ukuthenga kwakho.
cart.addCardPrompt: Ukuze wengeze ikhadi lekhredithi, sicela uchofoza inkinobho ethi Engeza Ikhadi Elisha.
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Sicela ukhokhele ukuze kusebenziswe inkonzo. Uma inkokhelo itholakele, inkonzo yakho izosebenziswa ngokuphazima kweso.
cart.bankPaymentNote: Ngemuva kokukhokha, vula ithikithi lenkxaso elinombolo yethransekshini, usuku, nenani elikhokhiwe. Sizonikela inkokhelo ngokwethu.

creditCard.name: Igama
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Ukuqinisekisa kuyadingeka ngaphambi kokuba ikhadi lakho lekhredithi libe khona ukusetshenziswa. I-InterServer izoshaja ikhadi lakho lekhredithi ngemali emibili engaphansi kwe-$1.00 ngayinye.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: Lezi zindleko zizobonakala kuyona isitatimende sakho sokubhilela ngaphakathi kweminithi embalwa, ngokuvamile ngaphansi kwezinkokhelo ezilindile. Uma ungaboni lezi zindleko, sicela uxhumane nomkhiqizi wekhadi lakho lekhredithi ukuze uthole imininingwane eyengeziwe.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: Lezi zikhokho zokugunyaza zikhona kuphela ngenhloso yokucubungula futhi zizocinywa phakathi kwezinsuku ezingu-3-5, kuye ngasebhange lakho.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: Ngamukela izindleko ezimbili zesikhashana ezingaphansi kwe-$1.00 ngayinye.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Ngena ku-akhawunti yakho yebhange le-akhawunti lekhredithi nge-inthanethi noma shayela ibhange lakho ukuqinisekisa izinani ezimbili ezikhokhelwe. Zivame ukubonakala ngaphansi Kwezindleko Ezilindile ebhange lakho. Lezi zikhokho zokugunyaza zizonyamalala ngezinsuku ezingangu-3-5 kuye ngasebhange lakho.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Sicela ungenise izinani ezimbili ezikhokhelwe kwikhadi lakho lekhredithi. Amanani kufanele abe ngama-USD.
creditCard.currencyNote: Sicela uqaphele ukuthi izindleko kukhadi lakho lekhredithi zingaba ngohlobo lwemali olwehlukene kulolo oludingekayo ekhasini lokugcina lokuqinisekisa oluchazwe ngenhla. Uma isitatimende sekhadi lakho lekhredithi singabonisi izinani zethransekshini zokuqala ngohlobo lwemali oludingekayo, kuzodingeka uxhumane nenkampani yakho yekhadi lekhredithi. Kufanele bakwazi ukukutsela izinani zezindleko ezimbili ngohlobo lwemali lwasekuqaleni.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa ikhadi lakho lekhredithi {card}?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: Leli khadi liqunjanisiwe futhi livuliwe ukusetshenziswa ohlelweni lwethu.
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Chofoza lapha ukuvula leli khadi lekhredithi ukusetshenziswa.

paymentSuccess.title: Inkokhelo Iphumelele
paymentSuccess.thankYou: Siyabonga ngokukhokha kwakho. Ithransekshini yakho iqediwe ngempumelelo.

paymentTypes.title: Izinhlobo Zenkokhelo
paymentTypes.ccNote: Wonke amaakhadi ekhredithi kufanele aqinisekiswe ngaphambi kokuba asetshenziswe. Ukuwaqinisekisa, chofoza inkinobho ethi "Qinisekisa".
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa ikheli lakho {id}?

prepays.title: Izimali Ezikhokhelwe Kusengaphambili
prepays.showingPage: Kuboniswa ikhasi {page} ku {totalPages} namarekhodi angu-{records} phakathi kuka-{totalRecords}
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa i-prepay yakho #{id} nomlando wayo onxenye?
